title: Luma just launched its new image model, Uni-1. I had early access and have been using it for the last few days. It’s extremely powerful. It works really well with text and reference images. But what impressed me most is its text-to-image quality. I ran some of my best prompts, and it nailed almost every single one. Here are a few examples 1/2 Reference image outputs
